evidence: "Fairly decent sci-fi show. a few twists in the story line have made this program interesting."
"Nice continuation of the Inspector Morse series."
"A little on the weird side, but entertaining."
"Mildly entertaining, but it is not a scripted drama, but a 'documentary' type of show."
"Promising story, was let down by the overall production."
"Very well done production. Beautifully photographed. Great story lines. Quality all around."
"The British know how to put on a production. First rate."
"Always have been a fan of Titus Welliver since his appearances on NYPD Blue and Deadwood."
"Very well done production. Always have been a fan of Titus Welliver since his appearances on NYPD Blue and Deadwood."
"Very well done production. As always, British shows just have a classy look and feel to them."
"Glad I wasn't living then....... Really enjoyed Simon Woods portrayal of the older Octavian."
"Marvelous show. Enjoying every minute of it."

summary: The user enjoys sci-fi and drama genres, with a strong preference for high production quality and emotional resonance in their viewing experiences. They have mixed feelings about narrative complexity and pacing, indicating a nuanced taste in storytelling.
